title: Bundled Runtime Dependency Integrity
objective: Verify bundled plugin runtime dependencies stage correctly, remain reusable on warm starts, and do not produce missing dependency errors.

phases.title: Cold Runtime Dependency Start
phases.intent: Start a fresh env and capture bundled runtime dependency staging logs.

phases.title: Warm Runtime Dependency Restart
phases.intent: Restart with staged dependencies already present and verify no repeated expensive staging or missing dependency errors.
